text.content: 1.0  Transition Into Exit Check  [s1_0_transition_into_exit_check]

rich_text.plain_text: 1.0  Transition Into Exit Check  [s1_0_transition_into_exit_check]

text.content: "You've built expressions from pictures and matched expressions to pictures. Let's see what you know."

rich_text.plain_text: "You've built expressions from pictures and matched expressions to pictures. Let's see what you know."

text.content: 1.1  Build Expression Boxes  [s1_1_build_expression_boxes]

rich_text.plain_text: 1.1  Build Expression Boxes  [s1_1_build_expression_boxes]

text.content: 3 boxes appear, each containing 4 items (cookies or markers). Equal groups visualization in reading mode.

rich_text.plain_text: 3 boxes appear, each containing 4 items (cookies or markers). Equal groups visualization in reading mode.

text.content: Equation builder appears below the boxes. Two blank slots with multiplication symbol between them. Tile palette shows numbers 1 through 10.

rich_text.plain_text: Equation builder appears below the boxes. Two blank slots with multiplication symbol between them. Tile palette shows numbers 1 through 10.

text.content: "Build the expression for these boxes."

rich_text.plain_text: "Build the expression for these boxes."

text.content:
tool: place_tile  target: equation_builder_boxes
"Build the expression."

rich_text.plain_text:
tool: place_tile  target: equation_builder_boxes
"Build the expression."

text.content: ✅ Student placed 3 and 4, building 3 × 4

rich_text.plain_text: ✅ Student placed 3 and 4, building 3 × 4

text.content: "Right. 3 times 4."

rich_text.plain_text: "Right. 3 times 4."

text.content: ❌ Student reversed the numbers, placing 4 × 3 instead of 3 × 4

rich_text.plain_text: ❌ Student reversed the numbers, placing 4 × 3 instead of 3 × 4

text.content: Boxes highlight one at a time.

rich_text.plain_text: Boxes highlight one at a time.

text.content: "You got the numbers, but check the order. First number: how many groups? Count the boxes. Second number: how many in each group? Count inside one box."

rich_text.plain_text: "You got the numbers, but check the order. First number: how many groups? Count the boxes. Second number: how many in each group? Count inside one box."

text.content: ❌ Student placed incorrect values on first attempt

rich_text.plain_text: ❌ Student placed incorrect values on first attempt

text.content: "Remember the two questions. How many groups? How many in each group?"

rich_text.plain_text: "Remember the two questions. How many groups? How many in each group?"

text.content: ❌ Student placed incorrect values on second attempt

rich_text.plain_text: ❌ Student placed incorrect values on second attempt

text.content: Boxes highlight one at a time as guide counts.

rich_text.plain_text: Boxes highlight one at a time as guide counts.

text.content: "Let's count together. How many boxes? 1, 2, 3. That's the first number. Now look inside one box. How many items? 1, 2, 3, 4. That's the second number."

rich_text.plain_text: "Let's count together. How many boxes? 1, 2, 3. That's the first number. Now look inside one box. How many items? 1, 2, 3, 4. That's the second number."

text.content: ❌ Student answered incorrectly. System models the answer.

rich_text.plain_text: ❌ Student answered incorrectly. System models the answer.

text.content: Boxes highlight one at a time as guide counts groups.

rich_text.plain_text: Boxes highlight one at a time as guide counts groups.

text.content: Items in one box highlight as guide counts items.

rich_text.plain_text: Items in one box highlight as guide counts items.

text.content: Guide demonstrates placing 3 tile into first slot.

rich_text.plain_text: Guide demonstrates placing 3 tile into first slot.

text.content: Guide demonstrates placing 4 tile into second slot.

rich_text.plain_text: Guide demonstrates placing 4 tile into second slot.

text.content: "Here's how this works. I count the groups: 1, 2, 3. Three boxes. That's my first number. Then I look inside one box: 1, 2, 3, 4. Four items. That's my second number. The expression is 3 times 4. First number shows how many groups, second number shows how many in each."

rich_text.plain_text: "Here's how this works. I count the groups: 1, 2, 3. Three boxes. That's my first number. Then I look inside one box: 1, 2, 3, 4. Four items. That's my second number. The expression is 3 times 4. First number shows how many groups, second number shows how many in each."

text.content: 1.2  Identify Visual Expression  [s1_2_identify_visual_expression]

rich_text.plain_text: 1.2  Identify Visual Expression  [s1_2_identify_visual_expression]

text.content: Equation builder displays static expression 4 × 2 in expression mode.

rich_text.plain_text: Equation builder displays static expression 4 × 2 in expression mode.

text.content: Visual option A: 4 bags with 2 items in each.

rich_text.plain_text: Visual option A: 4 bags with 2 items in each.

text.content: Visual option B: 2 bags with 4 items in each (factor reversal).

rich_text.plain_text: Visual option B: 2 bags with 4 items in each (factor reversal).

text.content: Visual option C: 6 items scattered without equal group structure (sum of factors).

rich_text.plain_text: Visual option C: 6 items scattered without equal group structure (sum of factors).

text.content: "Which picture matches this expression?"

rich_text.plain_text: "Which picture matches this expression?"

text.content:
tool: multiple_choice  options: ["A", "B", "C"]
"Select the picture that shows 4 times 2."

rich_text.plain_text:
tool: multiple_choice  options: ["A", "B", "C"]
"Select the picture that shows 4 times 2."

text.content: ✅ Student selected A: 4 bags of 2, correct match for 4 × 2

rich_text.plain_text: ✅ Student selected A: 4 bags of 2, correct match for 4 × 2

text.content: Option A highlights to confirm selection.

rich_text.plain_text: Option A highlights to confirm selection.

text.content: "That's right. 4 groups with 2 in each."

rich_text.plain_text: "That's right. 4 groups with 2 in each."

text.content: ❌ Student selected B: 2 bags of 4, factor reversal error

rich_text.plain_text: ❌ Student selected B: 2 bags of 4, factor reversal error

text.content: First number in expression highlights.

rich_text.plain_text: First number in expression highlights.

text.content: "The first number tells you how many groups. Look at the first number in 4 times 2. How many groups do you need?"

rich_text.plain_text: "The first number tells you how many groups. Look at the first number in 4 times 2. How many groups do you need?"

text.content: ❌ Student selected C: 6 scattered items, not equal groups

rich_text.plain_text: ❌ Student selected C: 6 scattered items, not equal groups

text.content: Bags in option A highlight.

rich_text.plain_text: Bags in option A highlight.

text.content: "Multiplication shows equal groups. The expression tells you how many groups and how many in each. Which picture shows groups?"

rich_text.plain_text: "Multiplication shows equal groups. The expression tells you how many groups and how many in each. Which picture shows groups?"

text.content: ❌ Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

rich_text.plain_text: ❌ Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

text.content: Option A bags highlight one at a time, then items in one bag highlight.

rich_text.plain_text: Option A bags highlight one at a time, then items in one bag highlight.

text.content: "Let me show you. The expression 4 times 2 means 4 groups with 2 in each group. I count the groups: 1, 2, 3, 4 bags. Then I check inside one bag: 2 items. Option A shows 4 groups of 2. That's what the expression means."

rich_text.plain_text: "Let me show you. The expression 4 times 2 means 4 groups with 2 in each group. I count the groups: 1, 2, 3, 4 bags. Then I check inside one bag: 2 items. Option A shows 4 groups of 2. That's what the expression means."

rich_text.plain_text: Circles highlight one at a time.

text.content: "Count the circles: that number goes first. Then count the dots inside one circle: that number goes second. Place those two tiles."

rich_text.plain_text: "Count the circles: that number goes first. Then count the dots inside one circle: that number goes second. Place those two tiles."

rich_text.plain_text: Guide counts circles one by one, highlighting each.

text.content: Guide places 5 tile into first slot.

rich_text.plain_text: Guide places 5 tile into first slot.

text.content: Guide places 3 tile into second slot.

rich_text.plain_text: Guide places 3 tile into second slot.

text.content: "Let me show you. I count the circles: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5. That is 5 groups. I place the 5 tile first. Then I look inside one circle and count the dots: 1, 2, 3. That is 3 in each group. I place the 3 tile second. The expression is 5 times 3."

rich_text.plain_text: "Let me show you. I count the circles: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5. That is 5 groups. I place the 5 tile first. Then I look inside one circle and count the dots: 1, 2, 3. That is 3 in each group. I place the 3 tile second. The expression is 5 times 3."
